project_type: Full-stack care home management app (CareVista) with Express backend and React frontend
build_system: npm for both; backend uses tsc, frontend uses Vite + tsc
test_framework: No tests exist in the codebase currently
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/backend && npm run build && cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/frontend && npm run build
test_command: No test command available - verify via build only
verification_instructions: 1. Run backend build (tsc) and confirm zero errors. 2. Run frontend build (tsc && vite build) and confirm zero errors.
setup_instructions: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
environment_constraints: Open internet - can install npm packages. No running PostgreSQL/Redis, so verify via build only. Backend strict TS mode (strict: true in tsconfig). Frontend non-strict (strict: false).
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: controllers in backend/src/controllers/, routes registered in backend/src/routes/index.ts, API client methods in frontend/src/services/api.ts, hooks in frontend/src/hooks/index.ts, pages in frontend/src/pages/, types in frontend/src/types/index.ts, routes in frontend/src/App.tsx NAV_ALL and Routes.
key_patterns: Backend: Express controllers export async functions (req, res, next). Use query() from models/db for SQL. AI operations via runAiOperation() from services/ai.service.ts. Middleware: authenticate, isManager, isClinical, isStaff. Frontend: React Query hooks wrapping Axios API calls. Pages are single-file components. Inline styles (no CSS framework). Nav items in NAV_ALL array in App.tsx. Types exported from types/index.ts.
directory_structure: backend/src/controllers/ - API logic, backend/src/routes/index.ts - all routes, backend/src/services/ - AI and audit services, backend/src/middleware/ - auth/upload, backend/migrations/ - SQL migrations (001-005), frontend/src/pages/ - page components, frontend/src/components/ - shared components, frontend/src/hooks/index.ts - all hooks, frontend/src/services/api.ts - API client, frontend/src/types/index.ts - all types
